name: california-lassen
description: Lassen County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: Lassen County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past Lassen County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('Lassen County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: Lassen County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract Lassen County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-lassen-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-lassen-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
The page is a single department detail page (node-department-page) rather than a listing of multiple representatives.
Representative data is likely contained within a truncated 'field' section (indicated by <!-- [truncated] -->), suggesting the HTML provided does not contain the actual representative records.
The 'detailUrl' and 'photoUrl' fields will likely contain relative URLs (e.g., /sites/...) requiring absolutization.
The sidebar contains navigation links for the department but no specific representative data.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for Lassen County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: Lassen County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for Lassen County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: Lassen County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
NOTE: UNCERTAIN — No NetFile portal found for Lassen; small county.
